summary: Backend (14/14) + Frontend e2e PASS for Comparative Reports redesign. All 5 new endpoints (asset-type/locations, asset-type/assets, station-supervisors, ros, ro-supervisors) return spec-compliant payloads. Frontend: Section C is GONE, Section A + Section B render, 4-level drill works (type → station-grouped locations → assets → AssetHistoryDrawer), Section B station-mode loads SUPs with dept badges, clicking a SUP navigates to /performance/<sup_id> with working perf-back, Section B RO-mode loads RO header (avg MTTR + sup_count) + SUP list, station multi-select present. Cylinders show 3D depth + semantic coloring + V-shape break on Ceiling Fan outlier (max 2048.9). No blocking issues.

issues: When RO has an SSP/SUP with zero resolved repairs (e.g., 'Shyam · T1'), cylinder renders as ghost pill labelled 'no data' — acceptable but could be replaced with greyed-out badge for stronger visual signal.

critical_code_review_comments: comparative.py is now 1032 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into routers/comparative/{base.py,section_a.py,section_b.py,export.py} once stabilised.

station_supervisors / ro_supervisors perform N+1 mongo queries (one orange_list find per SUP, then one assets find per SUP). Acceptable for small SUP counts; should be batched if SUP cohort grows >50.
asset_type_assets sets `last_ins` via async cursor with sort=inspection_at desc then keeps first per asset — correct, but a per-asset $group aggregation would be faster on large datasets.
ro-supervisors returns ro_dept_id=None silently when RO has no department_id (rare); UI handles via department_name='—'. OK.
DEPT_PALETTE hash in frontend is stable across renders (good), but using department_id directly means renaming a dept won't change its color — by design.
section-b-station / section-b-ro selects don't show placeholder hint after a value is picked then cleared (state reset on category change is correct).

Asset-type cylinder labelled '(unnamed)' was not observed in the seed (no unnamed asset-types exist currently); the non-drillable behavior + admin warning banner code is present at lines 554-561 of ComparativeReportsPage.js and toast handler in renderRows, but NOT exercised by this run.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Section A drill 4 levels, Section B station→/performance route, Section B RO mode all verified; Section C absent)

test_credentials: SA001/admin123 verified. SSE001/admin123 available but not required for these tests.
seed_data_creation: None — read-only tests using existing seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login response key is 'token'; user object uses '_id' (not 'id'). Seed has 8 asset-types, 34 stations, 7 ROs. DHANBAD PLATFORM 1 has 1 'Paid Sleeping Pod' SP01 with orange status (defective 5.44d). RO 'Rahul · ELEC · DHN' has 2 SUPs (Ramprakash Barla 14.3hrs n=7, Shyam no-data). Section A test-ids: section-a-explorer, section-a-crumb-{i}, cyl-row-{i} inside. Section B: section-b-peers, section-b-category, section-b-station, section-b-ro. perf-back on /performance/:userId. Tests: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_comparative_redesign.py -v
